name: SHREK RAVE Is Coming To Oslo!
description:
SHREK RAVE IS COMING TO OSLO!
Where underground rave meets live stage show, the swamp transforms into a full-scale party built around heavy dance music, huge visuals and festival-level production. DJs drive the night with Techno, House, EDM, Drum & Bass and Shrek remixes, while Shrek characters and live moments appear throughout the night.


Expect the unexpected as the swamp comes alive with performances, games and chaotic Shrek energy.


Expect:
• DJs playing Techno, EDM, House, Drum & Bass & Shrek remixes
• Shrek characters performing live on stage
• Far Far Away Idol (Shrek karaoke competition)
• Onion Eating Competitions & Dance Battles
• Crazy Shrek visuals throughout the night
• Festival-scale rave production
• Swamp Juice served at the bar


Come dressed green or as your favourite Shrek character and join the swamp.


Venue: Vulkan Arena, Vulkan 26, 0178 Oslo, Norway
Date: Saturday 10th October, 2026
Time: 9pm-2am
Last Entry: 10:30pm (Arrive early to catch all performances and games)
ID: 18+


Tickets:
This show will sell out — secure your tickets in advance.


Dress Code:
Green or your favourite Shrek character.
We’ll be awarding a Best Dressed prize, so come ready to impress the swamp.


Follow for updates:
https://www.instagram.com/ukshrekrave/


** This is a Shrek-inspired event and is not affiliated with or endorsed by DreamWorks.**
